commit.message:
feat: Add context layer for internal security customer service delivery

Introduce the persistent context layer that treats internal engineering
teams as security customers with structured, agent-readable artifacts.
This is the durable backbone that security agents (Alpha-4, Beta-4,
Gamma, Delta, Sigma) read and write against via the Intelligence
Fusion Engine.

Structure:
- 3 internal security customers: Platform Engineering, AI/ML Engineering,
  DevOps/SRE — each with full artifact sets (profile, controls, roadmap,
  engagement, outcomes, findings, risk, agent autonomy tiers, playbooks,
  links.json)
- External customer tiered templates (supplier-partner, enterprise-direct, smb)
- Base templates for onboarding new internal customers
- CONVENTIONS.md defining schema rules, staleness policies, update patterns,
  source-of-truth hierarchy, and facts-vs-hypotheses provenance rules
- CLAUDE.md for Claude Code guidance in this repository

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Rank compound words by actual frequency instead of character-average heuristic

Use jieba's word frequency dictionary (583k entries) to rank compounds by
real-world usage. Also penalize proper nouns (Japanese surnames, place names)
as a secondary signal. Dramatically improves compound relevance — e.g. 木 now
shows 木材/木工/树木 instead of 就木/木下/高木.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add optimistic locking to pipeline and deploy store updates

PipelineUpdate and DeployUpdate now include `AND updated_at=$prev` in
the WHERE clause. If the row was modified between read and write, the
update affects 0 rows and returns ErrStaleUpdate. Store.Update retries
up to 3 times by re-reading and re-applying the callback.

This prevents silent lost updates when concurrent writers (e.g. check-in
loop + CLI command) modify the same pipeline row.

Refs #90

commit.message:
enhance: [loon] move storage v3 deltalog files under basePath/_delta/ to align with loon convention (#48150)

Related to #44956

Previously, V3 deltalogs were written to
{rootPath}/delta_log/{collID}/{partID}/{segID}/{logID}, separate from
the segment's basePath. The manifest used complex "../" relative paths
to bridge the two locations. This change writes V3 deltalogs directly to
{basePath}/_delta/{logID}, aligning with the C loon library's native
_delta/ convention and simplifying the manifest relative path to just
the logID filename. Legacy V1 segments and existing manifests remain
backward compatible.

Signed-off-by: Congqi Xia <congqi.xia@zilliz.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Live and testnet now both at 1:1 — one protocol, one standard

POLL S.6 added — Ambassador Regional Compensation Standard:
- Base: $200/month (all regions, all ambassadors)
- Maximum: $850/month via performance + regional bonuses
- Bonus breakdown: Regional Growth ($200) + Content ($200) +
  Governance ($100) + Regional Excellence ($150)
- Africa + South America: +15% excellence bonus weighting
  to incentivize emerging market community building

- Wallet-level public disclosure, no personal names required

- Total poll count: 50

Ground all 6 Clay generators in real mathematics

Replace synthetic parametric formulas with actual computation:
- RH: mpmath.zeta() + Hardy Z-function + Euler product (15 primes)
- P vs NP: pysat Glucose4 CDCL solver + backbone + UP cascade
- NS: scipy spectral PDE (2D vorticity in Fourier space)
- YM: SU(2) lattice gauge (quaternion plaquettes + topological charge)
- BSD: point counting over F_p + L-function Euler product (44 primes)
- Hodge: intersection form eigenvalues + integrality distance

Sweep confirmed: 5/6 positive separation, BSD strongest signal (0.004 vs 0.535).
Two-class partition: Affirmative={NS,RH,BSD,Hodge}, Gap={PvNP,YM}.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: 修复深层爬取多平台数据缺失问题

1. xhs store 补充 topic_id/crawling_task_id 字段写入（之前遗漏导致 dashboard 无法关联）
2. 抖音/贴吧爬虫在首页检测到验证码/安全验证时抛异常，触发 cookie 过期标记
3. worker 返回实际爬取数量，dispatcher 写入 total_crawled/success_count
4. dispatcher 连续 3 次爬取 0 条内容时触发熔断，避免浪费后续任务

commit.message:
Refactor sidebars to shared base component with improved toggle UX

- Extract base Sidebar component with right/left support, replacing
  the independent toggle buttons in NavigationSidebar and ThreadPanel
- Switch from flex layout to absolute overlay for both sidebars so
  they don't shift the main content when opened/closed
- Replace tiny floating circle button with a full-height handle strip
  straddling the border (~6px sidebar-side, ~26px content-side),
  making the toggle easy to hit without hunting for the cursor target
- Border line highlights on hover; cosmetic circle centered on border
- Lift panelCollapsed state into FileView; ThreadPanel renamed to
  ThreadSidebar
- Reduce content max-width from max-w-3xl to max-w-2xl for more
  breathing room from open sidebars

feat: align knowledge metadata across skills, hook, indexer, and existing docs (#556)

feat: per-tag historian opt-in, canvas nav overhaul, AI canvas tools, CI fix

Historian tag selection
- Add Tag.historianEnabled (default true) — tags can now be excluded from storage
- Historian schema migration: historian_enabled INTEGER column with DEFAULT 1
- TagEngine.updateTag and evaluateCompositeTag respect historianEnabled flag
- MonitorView tag detail panel: Log to Historian toggle with instant persistence

Process Canvas
- Alarm bubble suppressed while in Design mode; clears on mode switch
- Plant Overview navigator (M key / toolbar button): full-screen interactive map
- Tab key: cycle through blocks in spatial reading order
- Removed edge-pan auto-scroll timer that fought intentional movement

- Shortcuts overlay updated with Tab/M entries

HMI Assistant — Process Canvas awareness
- 8 new agent tools: list_canvases, create_canvas, switch_canvas,
  list_canvas_blocks, add_canvas_block, update_canvas_block,
  delete_canvas_block, arrange_canvas_grid
- System prompt updated with canvas coordinate system, block kind table,
  default sizes, design workflow — agent can now build full plant overviews
- DataService wires canvasStore into AgentService on startup

CI
- Fix broken TagEngineTests (removed reference to commented-out Tag.samples)
- Add historian flag tests
- Add Homebrew cache step to speed up CI runs
- Add open62541 path verification step
- Scope swift test to TagEngineTests (no hardware dependency)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: _parse_tweet() 将 created_at 从 Twitter 格式转换为 ISO 8601

Twitter 原始格式 'Tue Mar 10 00:19:33 +0000 2026' 与 SQLite
datetime() 函数返回的 '2026-03-10 00:19:33' 字符串比较时，
'T'(84) > '2'(50)，导致所有推文永远通过时间过滤，实际上是从
整库按 engagement 排序取前 500，而非"最近 4h"。

修复：在 _parse_tweet() 解析时转换为 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS'。
存量 ~15k 条已在 VPS 通过迁移脚本更新。

commit.message:
Add token refresh functionality with auto-refresh support

Token expiry tracking:
- Store token expiry timestamp in credentials
- Add is_token_expired() with configurable threshold
- Update set_token() to accept expires_in parameter

Configuration:
- Add auto_refresh option (default: true)
- Add refresh_threshold option (default: 300 seconds / 5 minutes)

Refresh mechanism:
- Add refresh_access_token() in auth/common.py
- Update get_api_client() to auto-refresh expired tokens
- Add campus auth refresh command with --output-token and --json options

Enhanced status command:
- Show token expiry time and remaining duration
- Display whether token is expired
- Show auto-refresh status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: emoji mojibake in CII/Convergence + ticker critical-only

- CII: replace server-sent levelEmoji/trendArrow (UTF-8 mojibake)
  with client-side FA circle dots + HTML entity arrows (↑/↓/→)
- Signal Convergence: same fix — derive level dot client-side from level string
- Ticker: remove HIGH (severity>=3) fallback — ticker now only shows
  when genuine CRITICAL (severity>=4) events exist

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Precess sky map boundaries from B1875.0 to J2025.0 and adjust font sizes

Use astropy to precess segment and label coordinates to J2025.0 after
merging, reducing the precession error from ~1.4° to near zero for the
current epoch. Simplify the renderer to handle general (slightly tilted)
segments. Reduce constellation symbol size (48→36) and increase table
text size (12→14sp, 9→10sp).

commit.message:
fix(ci): Resolve integration test failures across languages

- Python: Fix saga_handler import (ExecuteFunc → HandleFunc) after API change
- Rust: Set skaffold push: false to match other languages (fixes ErrImagePull)
- Java: Add missing Main.java entry points and EventBook constructors for
  table and hand aggregates (fixes ClassNotFoundException)
- C++: Fix port mismatch in Containerfile (50501→50601 series)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add mutex to Orchestrator to prevent concurrent state mutations

CheckIn() could fire concurrently from both the timer tick and monitor
notification, causing two goroutines to process the same pipeline and
create duplicate sessions. CLI commands (Retry, Fail, Abort, Create)
could also race with CheckIn.

Added sync.Mutex to Orchestrator, locked at all public entry points.
Internal callers (processQueue→create, CleanupAll→cleanup) use
unlocked methods to avoid deadlock.

Refs #90

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
